title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Jagdishpur
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Jagdishpur assembly segment.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Jagdishpur
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Jagdishpur constituency.
